title: In views gallery, the app is by "account name" instead of by "app creator"
excerpt:
Hey, 
My public app is displayed in the views gallery of another account that installed the app as if the app is by that account, and not by my account. 
Cheers, 
Ronen

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff,

Thanks for giving us a heads up on this. Let me check in with the team on this and recreate on our side.

-Daniel
